'''Granus IV''' was an uninhabited [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]. The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]] [[Tigor Sims]] was shot down over the world while carrying crucial datafiles.

{{Planet-stub}}
